daily.today_energy: Your vibe is introspective and grounded. The moon's current phase invites you to slow down and tune into what actually matters. Trust the quiet moments—they're speaking volumes.
daily.love: Someone's been thinking about you more than you realize. If you're coupled up, a small gesture of vulnerability could deepen things. Single? Your authenticity is your biggest turn-on right now.
daily.career: Ideas are flowing, but resist the urge to act on everything immediately. Jot them down, let them marinate. Your intuition about which projects deserve energy is sharp today.
daily.health: Your body's asking for rest and hydration, not hustle. Consider a walk, some stretching, or time near water. Mental clarity follows when you honor these gentle nudges.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is all about shedding what no longer serves you, Cancer. You're feeling more grounded and ready to move forward. Trust your gut—it's been spot on lately. Embrace the shifts happening around you.
weekly.love: Whether single or coupled up, your emotional authenticity is magnetic rn. Someone might be picking up on your vibe. Don't overthink connections; let them unfold naturally. Your vulnerability is literally your superpower this week.
weekly.career: Creative momentum is building. This is the time to pitch that idea or take on a project that actually excites you. Your intuition about which opportunities matter is sharp—follow it. Small wins are adding up to something bigger.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for more movement and less doom-scrolling. Even gentle activities feel revitalizing right now. Pay attention to what genuinely nourishes you versus what's just habit. Your energy levels are telling you something important.
